description.value:
At 7th level, you've gained enough experience to the point that your inner power bleeds into your fighting. When you cast a jutsu without a nature release keyword, you can spend chakra equal to the rank of the jutsu to add the nature release keyword of the nature that you gained from this clan and change the damage type to match it. (D/C-Rank: 3; B/A-Rank: 6; S-Rank: 9) You do not spend chakra to concentrate on jutsu with the nature release keyword you gained from this clan with a range of Self, and while concentrating on them you reduce damage taken from melee attacks by your base Strength or Charisma modifier.

At 11th level, while gaining the benefits of a jutsu with the nature release keyword you gained from this clan, you reduce the amount of damage reduction creatures have against your damage that is from sources other than jutsu cast as Reactions by an amount equal to the rank of the jutsu you are gaining the benefits of. (D/C-Rank: 3; B/A-Rank: 6; S-Rank: 9)

At 15th level, while gaining the benefits of a jutsu with the nature release keyword with a range of Self, if your passive Martial Arts exceeds a creature's passive Insight by 5 or more, once per round you can grant an attack you make against them advantage or impose a saving throw you force them to make disadvantage.
